items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where bulk deletion necessitates confirmation or a reason. However, the provided evidence does not include any details or records demonstrating that this requirement was tested or met. The evidence primarily focuses on prior steps related to customer bookings and adversary actions, which do not address the specific scenario of bulk deletion confirmation, leading to an inconclusive status.
